channel.title: Last Contact, the hopepunk webnovel.
channel.description: An RSS Feed containing the chapters of Last Contact which is a hopepunk webnovel set in the 23rd and 24rd centuries of human history.

item.title: Io
item.description: Sam and Gwen train for the war, on the very hostile volcanic moon of Jupiter.

item.title: Backdoor
item.description: A backdoor built into the government of the United States decades ago gets triggered and locks down some key data that is needed to enforce power and restart the cycle.

item.title: Polymer Twins
item.description: Tim & Allorien travel to Pluto with Sen. Pace, traveling though the Polymer Twins that protect Pluto.

item.title: Representation
item.description: King Romulus witnesses Le'Rue abandoning the lives of Sam and Tim to save the king's daughter when he could have saved all three.

item.title: Reignite
item.description: Sai is on trial for violating her oath to watch humanity without interference, and old wound in the Crysix species reopens.

item.title: Projection
item.description: An alien is seen a human spacecraft for the first time, and Tim witnesses a Crysix coming of age ceremony.

item.title: Keeping Notes
item.description: Jamie learns a disturbing truth about his parents, and starts opening his mind to the history of humanity.

item.title: The Generals
item.description: Sam, Gwen, & Tim are introduced to the two generals that will guide their skill development and more details surface about the Axion particle that powers the Crysix society.

item.title: Avalon
item.description: Jaedon tears through poisonous clouds of venus with everyone in his ship to reach Avalon Castle undetected. They all face a security system that had never seen a Crysix being before.

item.title: Connection
item.description: Cassandra, at 13, makes a connection with a 14 year old thief. A connection that will last a very long time with a great deal of benefit to both parties.

item.title: The Wall
item.description: Gwen, Sam, & Tim explore the far reaches of the grounds of their university and find that there is much more to the world than they expected.

item.title: History Class
item.description: Nearly six years after being assigned the mission, Jaedon Beyar is teaching history and begins the process of saving three young people from prison.

item.title: Bridge
item.description: Prince Hedlund receives a back channel communication from Senator Pace, in an attempt to create a calmer future.

item.title: Building
item.description: Chancellor Fulton leads his generals in building a plan to intimidate Terra Further. Cassandra has her own feelings about the project.

item.title: The Pact
item.description: Ten years after meeting, Tim Li and Allorien head to the Crysix home world of Eblypso to sign a pact between the two species marking a step forward in the relations of the species.

item.title: Welcoming
item.description: After Retreating from Venus' space protections moving to Venus' Second Lagrange Point, Allorien is asked to come aboard Edith. Humans make contact with an alien species.

item.title: Blow Up
item.description: A scientist who melds two oft separate practices becomes frustrated. Chancellor Fulton punishes his top generals. Cassandra Fulton, well, is Cassandra.

item.title: Discovery
item.description: Allorien watches the launch of the Hubble Space Telescope and wishes it really could be used to discover what humanity needed to see.

item.title: Mission
item.description: Jaedon Beyar (codename: Xavix) receives his secret mission from The King of Venus. And the king continues a long going feud with the official elected leadership of the Republic.

item.title: Breakthrough
item.description: A little bit into the journey to Venus, in the middle of the asteroid belt, Tim reaches out with his mind, and finds something not quite human.

item.title: The Three
item.description: Sam, Gwen, and Tim all find different paths into Terra Firma's net. Trapped by the Chancellors orders the three of them don't know what comes next.

item.title: Hatred
item.description: Chancellor Fulton Reacts to the theft of the memory cores from the underground vault and plans for a new system of control.

item.title: Fracture
item.description: One third of humanity leaves the only planet home we had ever known, Earth, to start a new life somewhere else. Allorien and their new junior Fae watch the process as it unfolds.

item.title: World War Three
item.description: Humanity fights itself, again, in the third world war. The Eurasian Empire defends the city of Mariupol. Sai and Allorien witness the very thing they were trying to prevent. Sai retires.

item.title: Spillover
item.description: Allorien changes the natural course of the universe and thinks a pandemic will help unite humanity against a common foe.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Tim and Allorien make contact. Although, Allorien broke the rules along the way. The strongest lasers in the history of humanity fire on Allorien.

item.title: Detection
item.description: Sam struggles with his past. Tim learns we are not alone in the universe. It sparks just the littlest hope in the universe. One clings onto hope the other doesn't.

item.title: Adjudication
item.description: Humanity is on trial. Fae and Allorien the two litigators are both charged with overseeing humanity. They have very differing opinions.

item.title: Revelations
item.description: The ending beats of a prison break occur as Tim Li and Samuel Knudsen are saved from the prison that is Saturn's third moon. They recover memories of their youth.

item.title: Memories
item.description: Alestra Amalee (codename: Ylena) sneaks into the underground storage vault of Terra Firma's Empire to steal her way to a new life.

item.title: Beginning
item.description: Allorien watches an act of terrorism. Instructed not to interfere they are staggered by humanity's desire to fight each other.

item.title: Acknowledgment
item.description: Tim Li, the President of Humanity, gives a speech to all of humanity that may save, or end, his career.

item.title: Dedication
item.description: Tim Li, the President of Humanity, consults with his closest advisors before one of the most important speeches of his career.
